title: Add discard confirmation when leaving Create Session with unsaved changes
Remove dead local notification system from SessionContext
Remove debug console.log and unused imports
Fix UpdateUserInput type and fire-and-forget notification error swallowing
Unify skill level system between Profile and CreateSession
Fix submitting pattern inconsistency (useRef vs useState)
Replace time pill grid with native DateTimePicker for custom time input
problem: Fixed pill grid only allows preset times (8AM, 9AM, etc). Users cannot enter 6:15 PM or any non-preset time. Hard blocker for creating sessions.
solution: Replace time chips with iOS native UIDatePicker (expo has DateTimePicker). Keep Quick Pick presets as shortcuts.

title: Add success feedback after joining a session
problem: Tapping Join Session jumps back to Discover with no toast/haptic. User doesn't know if join succeeded. Toast component already exists.
solution: Show toast 'Joined session 🎾' after joinSession succeeds — stay on detail screen, don't auto-navigate back.

title: Add success feedback after saving Profile
problem: Save Changes silently closes. User unsure if skill level actually saved.
solution: Toast 'Profile updated ✓' already implemented — verify it's working. If not, fix the Toast display.

title: Replace FAB with iOS-native top-right + button
problem: Floating green FAB is an Android Material Design pattern. iOS users expect a + in the navigation bar.
solution: Move create action to TopBar right side or keep FAB but add a top-right + as well.

title: Add back button labels per iOS HIG
problem: Back button shows only '<' chevron, iOS HIG expects '< Nearby Sessions' or '< Discover'.
solution: Add headerBackTitle to React Navigation screen options.
